researcher.description: Yellow Researcher & Analyst — intelligence gathering, analysis, evaluation

designer.description: Red-Orange Designer — solutions, architecture, wireframes, design specs

maker.description: Blue Maker — code, infrastructure, deployment, testing

marketer.description: Green Marketer — copywriting, campaigns, growth assets, distribution drafts

manager.description: Purple Manager (the Octopus) — orchestrates agents, enforces quality gates, synthesizes results

research.description: Spawn Yellow Researcher agent (Scout mode) to investigate a topic
research.template:
Interpret this as a command to spawn the Yellow Researcher agent. Decompose the task, dispatch the researcher subagent with clear scope and output format, then synthesize the results.

User request: research $ARGUMENTS

evaluate.description: Spawn Yellow Analyst agent (Evaluate mode) to grade a live product
evaluate.template:
Interpret this as a command to spawn the Yellow Analyst agent in Evaluate mode. Decompose the task, dispatch the analyst subagent to evaluate the target, then synthesize the results.

User request: evaluate $ARGUMENTS

design.description: Spawn Red-Orange Designer agent to create solutions
design.template:
Interpret this as a command to spawn the Red-Orange Designer agent. Decompose the task, dispatch the designer subagent with clear scope, then synthesize the results.

User request: design $ARGUMENTS

build.description: Spawn Blue Maker agent to build from a spec
build.template:
Interpret this as a command to spawn the Blue Maker agent. Decompose the task, dispatch the maker subagent with the spec, then synthesize the results.

User request: build $ARGUMENTS

market.description: Spawn Green Marketer agent for distribution and copy
market.template:
Interpret this as a command to spawn the Green Marketer agent. Decompose the task, dispatch the marketer subagent, then synthesize the results.

User request: market $ARGUMENTS

sprint.description: Full pipeline: research > design > build > market
sprint.template:
Interpret this as a command to run a full sprint pipeline. Decompose the goal, then run agents sequentially: first Researcher, then Designer, then Maker, then Marketer. Enforce quality gates between each stage. Synthesize the final results.

User request: sprint $ARGUMENTS

team.description: Parallel fan-out to multiple agents simultaneously
team.template:
Interpret this as a command to fan out work to multiple agents in parallel. Decompose the tasks, dispatch all relevant agents simultaneously, collect results, then synthesize.

User request: team $ARGUMENTS

review.description: Review loop between two agents for iterative refinement
review.template:
Interpret this as a command to run a review loop. Set up an iterative refinement cycle between two agents. Cap at 3-5 iterations. Synthesize the final approved output.

User request: review $ARGUMENTS

help.description: Show the Octopus agent roster and available commands
help.template: Display the Octopus greeting: the 5-line ASCII art banner, the agent roster with colors and roles, all available commands with descriptions, and a prompt asking what the user wants to orchestrate.
